infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ollia detects when your phone is moving as a sign of activity. For example, if your phone hasn't moved in a while, Ollia will send you a gentle nudge to confirm you're okay. No location data is stored or shared.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Ollia uses background location changes to detect phone activity. For example, if your phone stops moving for an extended period, Ollia will send you a gentle nudge to confirm you're okay. No location data is stored or shared.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Ollia uses background location changes to detect phone activity. For example, if your phone stops moving for an extended period, Ollia will send you a gentle nudge to confirm you're okay. No location data is stored or shared.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Ollia uses background location changes to detect phone activity. For example, if your phone stops moving for an extended period, Ollia will send you a gentle nudge to confirm you're okay. No location data is stored or shared.
